files.name: history.jsonl
files.description: Chronological memory entries in JSON Lines format. Each line is a JSON object with fields: timestamp (ISO-8601), type (string category), content (string detail). This file is to track events and not full conversations. Events must be concise past-tense summaries. Never copy raw input verbatim.

files.name: facts.md
files.description: Atemporal facts about the person — things that are true regardless of when they happened (e.g. occupation, location, relationships). No timestamps.
